summary: Iteration 17 - Indian Stock Market Analysis Module Testing Complete. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified all new stock analysis features: search, 7 tabs (Overview, Financials, Quarterly, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Shareholding, Peers), pros/cons in green/red, screener with 7 presets.

backend: GET /api/stocks/list returns 40 stocks with sectors SUCCESS
Stock list has required fields (symbol, name, sector) SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/analysis/reliance returns full fundamentals SUCCESS
Analysis includes fundamentals (P/E, ROE, D/E, EPS, OPM, NPM) SUCCESS
Analysis includes quarterly_results array SUCCESS
Analysis includes annual_pl array SUCCESS
Analysis includes balance_sheet array SUCCESS
Analysis includes cash_flow array SUCCESS
Analysis includes auto-generated pros and cons SUCCESS
Analysis includes analyst recommendations (target_mean, recommendation) SUCCESS
Analysis includes shareholding (promoters, fii, dii, public) SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/analysis/tcs works SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/analysis/hdfcbank works SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/peers/reliance returns Energy sector peers SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/peers/tcs returns IT sector peers SUCCESS
Peer data has required fields SUCCESS
POST /api/stocks/screener with no filters returns all stocks SUCCESS
Screener with pe_max filter works SUCCESS
Screener with roe_min filter works SUCCESS
Screener with combined filters works SUCCESS
Screener results have required fields SUCCESS
GET /api/stocks/screener/presets returns 7 presets SUCCESS
Presets have required fields (id, name, filters) SUCCESS
Presets include Warren Buffett and Benjamin Graham styles SUCCESS
Login still works after stock analysis addition SUCCESS
Market live endpoint still works SUCCESS
frontend: /stock-analysis shows search page with input SUCCESS
Search for Reliance shows result SUCCESS
All 7 tabs visible (Overview, Financials, Quarterly, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Shareholding, Peers) SUCCESS
Tab navigation works (Quarterly, Shareholding, Peers) SUCCESS
7 presets displayed (Warren Buffett, Benjamin Graham, Peter Lynch, Dividend Aristocrats, Debt Free, High Promoter, Value Picks) SUCCESS
Warren Buffett preset runs and shows results table SUCCESS
Screener results show 5 stocks with all metrics SUCCESS

features: Click to navigate to stock analysis

seed_data_creation: None - all data comes from yfinance LIVE API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified Indian Stock Market Analysis module: 1) /api/stocks/list returns 40 Indian stocks with 15 sectors. 2) /api/stocks/analysis/{symbol} returns full fundamentals via yfinance (P/E, ROE, D/E, EPS, OPM, NPM, quarterly results, annual P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, shareholding, auto-generated pros/cons, analyst recommendations). 3) /api/stocks/peers/{symbol} returns peer companies in same sector. 4) /api/stocks/screener with filters returns matching stocks. 5) /api/stocks/screener/presets returns 7 presets (Warren Buffett, Benjamin Graham, etc.). 6) Frontend /stock-analysis shows search page, /stock-analysis/:symbol shows full analysis with 7 tabs. 7) Frontend /screener shows presets, filters, and results table. 8) Pros displayed in green (emerald-400), Cons in red (red-400). All APIs are LIVE via yfinance (no mocking). API calls may take 5-10 seconds due to yfinance data fetching.
